item.title: Comment on Making a Simple OCR Android App using Tesseract by Kundan Singh
item.dc:creator: Kundan Singh
item.description: Hey nice article but I was searching a way to call this code from c++ on android is that possible
item.content:encoded: Hey nice article but I was searching a way to call this code from c++ on android is that possible

item.title: Comment on Google Code-in Mentions by Deepak malviya
item.dc:creator: Deepak malviya

item.title: Comment on About Me by Josh
item.dc:creator: Josh
item.description:
lol @ "Initial Commit"
Wait, so that means you were like 13 when you were helping me with SexyBookmarks??? Jeez dude. You're gonna go places for sure! :)
item.content:encoded:
lol @ “Initial Commit”

Wait, so that means you were like 13 when you were helping me with SexyBookmarks??? Jeez dude. You’re gonna go places for sure! 🙂

item.title: Comment on About Me by smartearnbuzz.com
item.dc:creator: smartearnbuzz.com
item.description: Hi, i just read your blog properly.... such amazing way of presentation. Wish you all the best.
item.content:encoded:
Hi, i just read your blog properly…. such amazing way of presentation.
Wish you all the best.

item.title: Comment on Making a Simple OCR Android App using Tesseract by Manoj
item.dc:creator: Manoj
item.description: Hi Gautam I am developing same app on iOS Please tell me what should be folder structure. I have done 1 for Camera and one for OCR is it correct? As I always get error of -h file missing.
item.content:encoded:
Hi Gautam
I am developing same app on iOS Please tell me what should be folder structure. I have done 1 for Camera and one for OCR is it correct? As I always get error of -h file missing.

item.title: Comment on About Me by Rashmi Ranjan Biswal
item.dc:creator: Rashmi Ranjan Biswal
item.description:
In reply to <a href="/about/#comment-199958">Abhishek</a>.
Hey Gautam, Good work! You achieved a lot in such a small time. Inspiring. Very well done and its good to see you growing with such quality skills is something awesome… keep up the good and hard work.
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Abhishek.

Hey Gautam,
Good work!
You achieved a lot in such a small time. Inspiring.
Very well done and its good to see you growing with such quality skills is something awesome… keep up the good and hard work.

item.title: Comment on Making a Simple OCR Android App using Tesseract by aimen
item.dc:creator: aimen
item.description:
In reply to <a href="/making-an-ocr-android-app-using-tesseract/#comment-196583">toto</a>.
did you applied it in android studio.if yes then please contact me at aimensyed528@gmail.com
item.content:encoded:
In reply to toto.

did you applied it in android studio.if yes then please contact me at aimensyed528@gmail.com

item.title: Comment on Making a Simple OCR Android App using Tesseract by Parul Singh
item.dc:creator: Parul Singh
item.description: I am using tess two 9.0.0 to scan MRZ of passport. Its working fine but if used continuously the ' getHOCRText ' method become very slow to read the text. To improve the performance I am passing the binarised image but not getting any result. Can't figure out the issue. Kindly help.
item.content:encoded: I am using tess two 9.0.0 to scan MRZ of passport. Its working fine but if used continuously the ‘ getHOCRText ‘ method become very slow to read the text. To improve the performance I am passing the binarised image but not getting any result. Can’t figure out the issue. Kindly help.

item.title: Comment on Making a Simple OCR Android App using Tesseract by Sahil
item.dc:creator: Sahil
item.description: I want to detect Marathi/Hindi language and get it translated in English. How to do the same?
item.content:encoded: I want to detect Marathi/Hindi language and get it translated in English. How to do the same?

item.title: Comment on Making a Simple OCR Android App using Tesseract by Evgeny
item.dc:creator: Evgeny
item.description:
In reply to <a href="/making-an-ocr-android-app-using-tesseract/#comment-211308">Ram Nomula</a>.
Hi,
I'm facing the similar problem with offline Arabic text OCR. Did you succeed with your app?
Please let me know to edrokov@gmail.com.
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Ram Nomula.

Hi,

I’m facing the similar problem with offline Arabic text OCR. Did you succeed with your app?

Please let me know to edrokov@gmail.com.
